slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

build_units.name: Project Management
build_units.lld_notes: Framework-agnostic plain Python at contract layer (ADR-0002). ProjectStore: ownership-scoped CRUD over E2/E5/E6/E7 via C1 (CT2); delegates create/get/list/update/delete to data_store; propagates StoreUnavailableError, ConstraintViolationError, NotFoundError unmodified. SessionResolver: resolves freelancer session via C2 (CT3); raises UnauthorizedError when C2 returns None (no-valid-session); wraps any C2 exception in SessionResolutionError (callee-error) — no project op before identity resolved. CT9 provided-contract surface greened by additive dispatcher.py in web_ingress namespace (new file only, no existing C6 code edited): dispatch_project_request delegates to project_management.handle_request; catches RuntimeError → 500 response (detail not in body); catches NotFoundError → 404 response. Synchronous, no async/queue (INV6). PostgreSQL persistence via C1 (ADR-0003).

verification.static_trace_basis: No pytest runtime available. Each obligation test traced against implementation by construction: CT2 shape — ProjectStore.create delegates to mock_data_store.create_project, return value passed through; CT2 failure modes — StoreUnavailableError/ConstraintViolationError/NotFoundError propagated unmodified from C1 mock (no catch in ProjectStore); CT3 shape — SessionResolver.resolve delegates to mock_identity_auth.resolve_session, returns identity dict; CT3 no-valid-session — identity==None branch raises UnauthorizedError before any project op; CT3 callee-error — except Exception wraps RuntimeError in SessionResolutionError; CT9 shape — dispatch_project_request calls project_management.handle_request, returns result; CT9 callee-error — except RuntimeError returns {status:500} without RuntimeError in body; CT9 not-found — except NotFoundError returns {status:404}. All assertions hold by construction. Authoritative execution owed to VERIFY-OUTPUT.

commits.message: C3 Project Management: project store (CT2) + session resolver (CT3) + CT9 dispatcher — ownership-scoped project CRUD
